lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Hello there. I haven't seen you around here before. If you've come to admire the Carnillean family home, I must warn you not to cause any trouble.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Due to recent criminal activities against such prominent Ardougnians, I have been sent here on special guard duty to ensure the Carnilleans' security.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Anyone caught interfering with the person or possessions of any Carnilleans will be taken to jail so quickly that their feet won't even touch the floor!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I wasn't actually planning on doing anything like that...

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Well look who it is! Good to see you managed to clear your name. I always had faith in you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! So is everything all quiet around here now?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Indeed! For now at least, everything is back to normal.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Hello, adventurer. It's a shame you never found that cult. We have a horrible suspicion that there's been another burglary.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Yes, it is. The thing is, we can't even work out what they've taken! It's all very odd.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything more I can do to help?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: I don't think so. Sir Ceril says you've done enough.
